questions.question: In 2025, which Indian state government announced a legacy policy aimed at ensuring the long-term utilization of sports infrastructure developed for the National Games?
questions.solution: The legacy policy to ensure long-term use of sports infrastructure from the National Games was announced by the Uttarakhand government in 2025. This policy aims at maximising the utility of the facilities beyond the event. Hence, Uttarakhand is the correct answer.

questions.question: In the 2024 Global Hunger Index released on October 2024, India is ranked 105ᵗʰ out of the how many countries?
questions.solution: Solution • In the Global Hunger Index (GHI) 2024 , India was ranked 105ᵗʰ . • The ranking was done among 127 countries . • The index measures hunger based on undernourishment, child wasting, child stunting and child mortality .

questions.question: What global events in late 2019 and early 2020 have contributed to a rethinking of globalisation strategies among policymakers?
questions.option_2: Decrease in oil prices and global warming
questions.solution: The COVID-19 pandemic began spreading globally in late 2019 and early 2020. It caused major disruptions in global supply chains, travel, and trade. Policymakers worldwide reconsidered their globalisation strategies to enhance resilience and reduce dependence on single sources. None of the other options had as significant an impact on rethinking globalisation during that period. Hence, the correct answer is COVID-19 pandemic.

questions.question: What is the theme of the STREE Summit 2025, as inferred from its description?
questions.option_1: "She Triumphs Through Respect, Equality, and Empowerment"
questions.solution: The STREE Summit 2025 focuses on respect, equality, and empowerment of women. This matches exactly with option 1: 'She Triumphs Through Respect, Equality, and Empowerment'. Other options are related to women's rights and gender equality but do not capture the full theme as described. Hence, the theme is option 1. Final answer: Option 1

questions.question: When was Namami Gange Programme launched to clean the Ganga river?
questions.solution: The Namami Gange Programme was launched by the Government of India in 2014 to clean and conserve the Ganga River . It is a Central Sector Scheme aimed at reducing pollution, improving sewage treatment, and rejuvenating the ecosystem of the river.

questions.question: Which Indian actor has been officially named as 'Fit India Icon' by Union Sports Minister Mansukh Mandaviya in March 2025?
questions.solution: Solution: In March 2025, the Fit India Icon title was announced by Union Sports Minister Mansukh Mandaviya The actor chosen was known for his fitness and disciplined lifestyle Ayushmann Khurrana was officially named as the Fit India Icon Hence, correct answer is Ayushmann Khurrana

questions.question: Which Indian filmmaker was inducted as a registered member of the European Film Academy in 2025?
questions.solution: Correct option is 3: Pan Nalin. Pan Nalin was inducted as a registered member of the European Film Academy in 2025. This membership recognises his contribution to cinema internationally. Other options like Sriram Raghavan, Kiran Rao, and Neeraj Ghaywan were not inducted in 2025. Hence, Pan Nalin is the right answer. Final answer: Option 3

questions.question: Which Indian player was appointed as the co-chair of the International Hockey Federation’s new FIH Athletes Committee in 2024?
questions.solution: The International Hockey Federation (FIH) appointed PR Sreejesh as the co-chair of its new Athletes Committee in 2024. PR Sreejesh is a prominent Indian hockey goalkeeper and leader, known internationally. This committee aims to represent athletes' interests in FIH decisions. Hence, the correct answer is PR Sreejesh.

questions.question: Which of the following days was observed on 21st May 2025?
questions.solution: National Voters Day is observed on 25th January every year. Indian Navy Day is observed on 4th December. National Human Rights Day is observed on 10th December. National Anti-terrorism Day is observed on 21st May each year, commemorating the death anniversary of Indira Gandhi. Since the question asks for the day observed on 21st May 2025, it is National Anti-terrorism Day. Hence, the correct answer is Option 3.

questions.question: Who among the following has overtaken Yuzvendra Chahal to become India’s highest wicket-taker in T20 Internationals at Eden Gardens in Kolkata on 22 January 2025?
questions.solution: Solution : On 22 January 2025 at Eden Gardens, Kolkata , a new milestone was achieved in T20 Internationals. Arshdeep Singh surpassed Yuzvendra Chahal to become India’s highest wicket-taker in T20Is. He achieved this feat during the T20I match played at Eden Gardens. Therefore, the correct answer is Arshdeep Singh .

questions.question: Who has been elected as the President of Centre of Films for Children and Young People (CIFEJ) for the 2025–2027 term?
questions.solution: Correct option is 3: Jitendra Mishra. Jitendra Mishra has been elected as the President of Centre of Films for Children and Young People (CIFEJ) for the 2025–2027 term.

questions.question: Who is the author of the book 'Leo: The Untold Story of Chennai Super Kings', which was launched in March 2025?
questions.solution: Solution • The book “Leo: The Untold Story of Chennai Super Kings” was launched in March 2025 in Chennai . • It was written by P.S. Raman , a senior advocate and former Vice-President of the Tamil Nadu Cricket Association (TNCA) . • The book describes the history, controversies, and success journey of the IPL team Chennai Super Kings (CSK) .

questions.question: Who is the author of the book titled 'I Am?', which was launched by Vice-president of India, Jagdeep Dhankhar in February 2025?
questions.solution: Correct Answer: Gopichand P. Hinduja The book “I Am?” was compiled/ authored by Gopichand P. Hinduja , Chairman of the Hinduja Group. It was launched by the Vice-President of India, Jagdeep Dhankhar, in February 2025 at the Vice President Enclave. The book focuses on philosophical reflections, spirituality, and multicultural understanding , reflecting the author’s life experiences and beliefs.

questions.question: Who is the Chairperson of the Hyderabad City Security Council (HCSC) supporting the STREE Summit 2025?
questions.solution: Explanation: The STREE Summit 2025 was organized by the Hyderabad City Security Council (HCSC) in Hyderabad. The Chairperson of HCSC supporting the summit is C. V. Anand , who is also the Hyderabad City Police Commissioner .

questions.question: Who is the chairperson of the RBI’s committee formed to develop the Framework for Responsible and Ethical AI (FREE-AI) in the financial sector as of December 2024?
questions.option_1: Dr. Rajeev Chandrasekhar from Ministry of Electronics
questions.option_2: Professor K. VijayRaghavan from Office of PSA
questions.option_3: Professor Pushpak Bhattacharyya from IIT Bombay
questions.option_4: Dr. Krishnamurthy Subramanian from IMF Board
questions.solution: The RBI committee for developing the Framework for Responsible and Ethical AI (FREE-AI) is chaired by Professor Pushpak Bhattacharyya. He is affiliated with IIT Bombay and recognised for his expertise in AI and technology. This appointment was confirmed in recent RBI publications as of December 2024. Hence, the correct chairperson is Professor Pushpak Bhattacharyya. Final answer: Option 3

questions.question: Who was appointed as the Chairman of the Union Public Service Commission by President Droupadi Murmu in May 2025?
questions.solution: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) Chairman is appointed by the President of India. In May 2025, President Droupadi Murmu appointed Dr. Ajay Kumar as the Chairman of UPSC. This is an official announcement and part of important current affairs for competitive exams. Hence, the correct answer is Dr. Ajay Kumar, option 2. This completes the answer.
